dash0_frontend.title: Senior Product Engineer, Frontend

Comfortable working on data-heavy interfaces, improving product quality through debugging and testing, and collaborating closely with product, design, and backend stakeholders.

bullets: Built and maintained production applications using React Native, JavaScript, and API-connected workflows for operational teams, with emphasis on usability and reliability.

Partnered with backend teams to deliver API-connected features and improve the end-to-end user experience.
